case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. GRACIE MANTE ET AL

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY  ASSOCIATES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MANTE, GRACIE DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-24-2018
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100039063) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 25
DECLARATION 1) COMPLIANCE WITH CCP SECTION 1033(B)(2) 2) WAIVER OF ATTORNEY FEES (TRANSACTION ID # 100039063) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY  ASSOCIATES, LLC
DECLARATION CUSTODIAN OF RECORDS IN SUPPORT OF APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100039063) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY  ASSOCIATES, LLC
ORDER AND DECLARATION OF CLERK TO REPRODUCE MISSING DOCUMENTS
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY, (TRANSACTION ID # 210062882): COLCLOUGH, III, ROBERT J. SUBSTITUTED FOR COOK, JORDAN D AS ATTORNEY FOR PORTFOLIO RECOVERY  ASSOCIATES, LLC

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $241.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 100039063) AS TO DEFENDANT MANTE, GRACIE
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN DIEGO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT MANTE, GRACIE

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100033466), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY  ASSOCIATES, LLC SERVED APR-22-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE APR-24-2018 AS TO DEFENDANT MANTE, GRACIE
DECLARATION CUSTODIAN OF RECORDS IN SUPPORT OF APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP CODE 1788.60(A) (TRANSACTION ID # 100039063) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY  ASSOCIATES, LLC

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY  ASSOCIATES, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MANTE, GRACIE $2,440.31 PRINCIPAL, $241.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,681.31, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN DIEGO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MANTE, GRACIE
